_source: CPIC Guideline for Fluoropyrimidines and DPYD (2017, 2024 update)

fluorouracil.Normal Metabolizer: Standard dose per protocol. Monitor for toxicity per routine clinical practice.
fluorouracil.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce starting dose by 50%. Titrate dose based on toxicity or pharmacokinetic testing. Monitor closely.
fluorouracil.Poor Metabolizer: Avoid use of fluorouracil. Select alternative agent. If fluoropyrimidine is the only option, use greatly reduced dose with therapeutic drug monitoring.

capecitabine.Normal Metabolizer: Standard dose per protocol. Monitor for toxicity per routine clinical practice.
capecitabine.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce starting dose by 50%. Titrate dose based on toxicity. Monitor closely for hand-foot syndrome and myelosuppression.
capecitabine.Poor Metabolizer: Avoid use of capecitabine. Select alternative agent. If fluoropyrimidine is the only option, use greatly reduced dose with therapeutic drug monitoring.

tegafur.Intermediate Metabolizer: Reduce starting dose by 50%. Monitor closely for toxicity.
